title: Additional Virtual Host Discovered
description: A distinct virtual host was discovered on an externally reachable HTTP/S service.
impact: Additional virtual hosts can materially expand the real attack surface and expose applications not visible from the default response.
likelihood: High because externally hosted multi-tenant or name-based services often expose more than one application surface.
recommendations: Review the discovered host for authentication, versioning, and exposed functionality.
Confirm whether the additional host is in scope and intended to be externally reachable.
Repeat standard HTTP, tech, and vulnerability checks against the discovered host.
